message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the east and should serve indian food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 5 people at 12:45 on saturday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 08:00 and should depart from bishops stortford
The train should go to cambridge and should be on the same day as the restaurant booking
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
